Off Calendar Sep-16-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Raymond Fong, of the Office of the District Attorney, Tel. 415.553.1752, for petitioners;
No other appearances in the matter.

Ruling: The matter was not argued. PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioners First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; Petitioners First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories is granted.
